brand_within_channel: Prime Documentary house style (faceless symbolic noir) applied to a finance-fraud episode.

signal: a single cold cyan/white for the return LINE so it reads against the gold
forbidden: bright saturated red as a base

mood: restrained, authoritative, quietly ominous; 'trust' rendered as warm gold that slowly turns cold as the truth emerges.
lighting: low-key, single-source, deep shadows, volumetric dust/haze, subtle film grain.
people_rule: NO real-person likeness of anyone (Madoff, whistleblower, family, victims, officials). People are anonymous silhouettes / backs of heads / hands only. No deepfakes. (invariant 11)

hero_motif.name: THE LINE
hero_motif.spec: An impossibly smooth, always-rising return curve on a dark grid, cold cyan/white stroke. Renders/animates in Remotion. Never dips meaningfully. Used as: opening image, per-act refrain, and final reveal (annotated as the red flag). Contrast device: a jagged 'real market' line shown beside it.
hero_motif.render: Remotion (tier K) — exact, data-driven, animatable; NOT a Midjourney image.

recurring_symbols: paper account statements / fabricated trade confirmations (stacks, drifting)
the Ponzi loop: coins passing from new hands to old hands in a closed circle
an empty vault / safe with nothing inside
unread warning letters piling at a vast institutional facade (the regulator)
a single calculator + annotated chart (the analyst)
courthouse exterior (NY federal courthouse framing), gavel as restrained accent
coins flowing partly BACK (the recovery beat)

typography.numbers_cards: large condensed sans, gold on black, for $65B -> $17.5B and '150 years'
typography.quote_citation_lowerthirds: small caps source label burned in for major claims, linked to claim_id (e.g. 'SEC OIG report, 2009' / 'SIPA Trustee')
typography.open_captions: burned-in, high-contrast, bottom-third, styled per channel

sref_strategy: Generate 3-5 MJ hero stills first; lock ONE --sref seed for the whole episode; reuse across all SDXL coverage for visual unity. Record the sref in library/visual if reusable across episodes.

thumbnail_concept.primary: The perfect rising LINE filling the frame (cold stroke on black/gold) + bold short text 'TOO PERFECT TO BE REAL'. No face. No pink.
thumbnail_concept.alt: An empty vault with a single golden statement fluttering + 'WHERE WAS THE $65 BILLION?'

do_not: present any generated visual as authentic historical footage
show a recognizable likeness of a real person
